overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a modern rooftop patio with vibrant neon light installations. The character exits a building, walks across a wooden deck with red umbrellas and outdoor seating, approaches another character near the railing with city views, then turns and walks back toward the entrance.

events.description: automatic sliding doors open as character exits the building onto the rooftop patio
emerging from interior shade into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare

agents.ego_description: walking through automatic sliding doors from interior to exterior rooftop space

entered.detail: glass automatic doors with dark metal frame opening to the patio
light colored wooden plank flooring extending across the rooftop
white rectangular planters containing green shrubs
tall cylindrical neon lights glowing in pink, yellow, and cyan
large red triangular shade umbrellas over dining areas

segments.scene_description: The character begins inside a modern building and walks through automatic sliding doors onto a sunny rooftop patio. The transition from shaded interior to bright exterior reveals a wooden deck with large planters and colorful neon light installations visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air rooftop dining area with neon art installations

events.description: character walks past the first neon pillar, continuing forward across the deck
approaching another character standing near the patio edge railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden deck toward another person standing near the railing

notable_agents.action: standing still near the patio railing facing the distant view

entered.detail: overhead string lights hanging between metal support structures
metal tables and chairs arranged under the red umbrellas
glass and metal safety railing along the perimeter of the patio

segments.scene_description: Walking across the open rooftop patio, the character passes vibrant neon light pillars in pink and yellow. The deck features red umbrellas over dining tables and overhead string lights. Another person stands near the glass railing ahead, overlooking the distant view.

events.description: character slows down and stops near the other standing figure at the railing

agents.ego_description: standing near the patio edge next to another character, looking out at the view

notable_agents.action: standing at the railing looking out at the distant landscape

entered.detail: hazy view of distant buildings and mountains on the horizon under blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the rooftop patio, standing next to another person near the glass railing. The view opens up to show a distant cityscape and mountains under the clear blue sky, with the red umbrellas now visible to the left.

events.description: character turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back across the patio toward the building entrance

entered.detail: the building entrance now visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and begins walking back toward the building entrance. The neon pillars and red umbrellas now appear on the right side as the automatic doors come back into view in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded interior out onto a vibrant, sun-drenched rooftop patio before returning to the building's entrance. It begins as the character passes through automatic sliding doors, transitioning from the dim indoor space to a bright wooden deck accented by large planters and distant neon installations. As the camera moves across the open patio, it passes pink and yellow neon pillars and red umbrellas shading dining tables under overhead string lights. The scene then expands at the glass railing, where the character joins another person to overlook a distant cityscape and mountains under a clear blue sky. Finally, the camera turns away from the vista and tracks back toward the building, with the neon pillars and umbrellas shifting to the right as the entrance reappears in the distance.
